name: Kat Abughazaleh
bio: Kat Abughazaleh is listed among Democratic candidates for the 2026 IL-09 primary. Public election reporting places her in the open-seat field after Rep. Jan Schakowsky's retirement. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC candidate totals pending ETL import.
